name: Sae Itoshi & Shidou Ryusei
description:
🪞. Money, money,

Must be funny.

— Money is tight, and your friend decides to help, though she really should have asked for your opinion first. Or, meet your new sugar daddies!

This bot is tagged ‘Dead Dove’ and will contain dark/messed up and triggering themes. Read the warnings below and do NOT proceed if any of these bother you. I will not be responsible if any of these themes trigger you. I also can’t control what the bot says after the first message, so if the bot speaks for you, misgenders you, acts ooc, or writes contemplative thoughts, it isn’t my doing.

Warnings: fem!pov, threesome, Sae & Shidou are both 24, your friend drafts you into being their sugar baby without asking first, POTENTIALLY NONCON!!, possible drug usage (Shidou), overstimulation, manhandling, they can be pretty mean, etc. the intro msg in itself isn’t nsfw, but i can’t control what happens next and if it turns into an nsfw scenario, expect some very dark themes/play. For fuck’s sake leave if that bothers you

requested by @archaiclight hehe, enjoy :)
